name: First Community Credit Union
description_short: First Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with online and mobile banking access.
description_long: First Community Credit Union (FCCU) operates as a credit union, a member-owned financial cooperative that provides traditional banking services. Based on their website, they serve consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks with a focus on member benefits and tools. FCCU offers a range of core banking products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, home loans, and credit cards. Their product lineup emphasizes member convenience through digital tools, including online banking, mobile app access, a Card Manager platform, and card swap functionality. The credit union differentiates itself as a member-owned institution rather than a shareholder-owned bank, which typically means profits are returned to members rather than shareholders. However, their website currently displays a 404 error page with limited operational information, making comprehensive assessment difficult. The routing number 313084674 is documented, suggesting active operations. Without access to their full website, rates, fees, membership requirements, and specific loan terms remain unclear from available sources.
pros: Member-owned credit union structure typically offers better rates and lower fees than traditional banks
Free mobile app available on Google Play for convenient banking
Multiple account types including rewards checking and money management checking options
Diverse loan portfolio including auto loans, personal loans, and home mortgages
Rewards credit card option available to members
Online and mobile banking access for 24/7 account management
Card Manager tool and Card Swap functionality for enhanced card management
cons: Website 404 error makes it difficult to access rates, fees, and membership requirements
Limited information available about APRs, loan terms, or competitive advantages
Membership requirements and eligibility criteria not clearly stated on accessible pages
No details provided about physical branch locations despite location-focused URL
Lack of transparent fee structure and product comparison details online
best_for: Consumers seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banks
Existing credit union members wanting comprehensive banking services
Borrowers interested in auto loans, personal loans, or mortgages with credit union rates
diagnosis: First Community Credit Union is best for existing or prospective credit union members seeking traditional banking services (checking, savings, loans) with member ownership benefits. The primary caveat is that their website is currently inaccessible for rate, fee, and membership details, requiring direct contact to evaluate specific competitive terms and eligibility requirements.
